_comment: B-15 — Curated allow-list of TruNorth slugs whose primary business is the manufacture or sale of firearms/ammunition. DELIBERATELY EXCLUDES brands that incidentally hold FFLs (Walmart, Dick's, etc.) — those use firearms_atf_ffl (B-37) for license disclosure. This flag is for 'pure-play' gun-industry membership. Curated conservatively 2026-06-07.

_format.rationale: <one line: why this brand is a firearms-industry member>

sturm-ruger-and-co.rationale: Sturm Ruger & Co. — top U.S. firearms manufacturer (pistols, rifles).

smith-and-wesson-brands.rationale: Smith & Wesson — major U.S. handgun + long-gun manufacturer.

vista-outdoor.rationale: Parent of Federal Premium / CCI / Remington Ammunition / Speer.

olin-corporation.rationale: Olin Corp — Winchester Ammunition (commercial + military contracts).

browning-arms-company.rationale: Browning Arms — sporting firearms manufacturer (FN Herstal subsidiary).

sig-sauer-inc.rationale: SIG Sauer Inc. — handgun + rifle manufacturer; U.S. Army M17/M18 contract.

colt-s-manufacturing-company.rationale: Colt's Manufacturing — historic U.S. firearms maker (1911, AR-15 platform).

bass-pro-shops.rationale: Bass Pro Shops — sporting-goods retailer; firearms are a primary product line (vs Walmart where it's incidental).

cabela-s-bass-pro.rationale: Cabela's (merged with Bass Pro) — sporting-goods retailer; firearms are a primary product line.
